instruction:
Repair the disturbed scenic SVG: ringed planet alien moon.

Patch:
- remove sv_033-extra-survey-marker
- download-sv_033-rect-002.fill: "#ef4444" -> "#c8ccd2"
- download-sv_033-ellipse-001.cx: 415.0 -> 380
- download-sv_033-path-003.stroke-width: 44.0 -> 40
- download-sv_033-ellipse-004.opacity: 0.18 -> 0.4
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 1600 1000">

    </radialGradient>
    <radialGradient id="neb13b" cx="0.5" cy="0.5" r="0.5">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#4a7ad4" stop-opacity="0.55" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#4a7ad4" stop-opacity="0" />
    </radialGradient>
    <radialGradient id="neb13c" cx="0.5" cy="0.5" r="0.5">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#3acab0" stop-opacity="0.4" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#3acab0" stop-opacity="0" />
    </radialGradient>
    <radialGradient id="planet13" cx="0.35" cy="0.35" r="0.75">
      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#f0c88a" /><stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#d49a5a" /><stop offset="0.8" stop-color="#a06a3a" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#5a3a22" />
    </radialGradient>

      <stop offset="0" stop-color="#d4b88a" stop-opacity="0" /><stop offset="0.3" stop-color="#e8d0a0" stop-opacity="0.9" /><stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#fff0d0" /><stop offset="0.7" stop-color="#e8d0a0" stop-opacity="0.9" /><stop offset="1" stop-color="#d4b88a" stop-opacity="0" />
